notes: Programmatic US-state child page for Arizona. Mirrors structural sibling at Alabama worker-classification page (../alabama/worker-classification-state-test/). Lead angle: Arizona's codified DIBS safe-harbour (ARS § 23-1601) — most US states have no codified safe-harbour. Original sprint prompt referenced 'ARS § 23-727 — 200% civil penalty for wilful misclassification'; on fetching the actual statute text, ARS § 23-727 covers employer account credits and contains no such penalty provision. The 200 percent number was dropped; brief documents the conflict. Used verified DES guidance instead (SUTA dumping = highest rate or +2 percent; criminal misrepresentation = Class VI Felony, up to 2 years prison, $150,000 per false statement). Hero photo from Unsplash (Tucson desert + Catalina mountains, 145KB).
